evals.prompt: Search the Library of Congress for photographs of the Civil War taken between 1861 and 1865. I want to see what's available and get some image links.
evals.expected_output: LOC photo search results for Civil War with date range filter and image URLs
expectations: The LOC API was queried at loc.gov with fo=json
The photos format endpoint or original-format facet was used
Multiple results are listed with titles
Image URLs or thumbnail links are provided

evals.prompt: I have LCCN 95521789 from a Library of Congress reference. Can you look up the full item details and get me a citation?
evals.expected_output: Full item detail for LCCN 95521789 with pre-formatted citation
expectations: A citation is provided (APA, Chicago, or MLA format)
Subject terms or description are included

evals.prompt: What collections does the Library of Congress have related to maps? Can you search their map collection for items about China?
evals.expected_output: LOC map collections and search results for China-related maps
expectations: The LOC API was used to search maps (maps endpoint or format facet)
China was used as a search term or location facet
